goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'kings lynn' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 11:45' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the 'south' and should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from kings lynn and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 11:45 and should leave on wednesday
Make sure you get departure time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the south and should include free parking
